description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The front features large floor-to-ceiling windows, a gated entry, and a small landscaped yard with a blossoming tree and red ground cover. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a green lawn, a swimming pool, and several lounge chairs. The side view reveals additional green spaces and a rooftop terrace area, while the other side has a more solid wall with minimal window openings. The house is surrounded by a low perimeter wall and includes a driveway and garage area. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and contemporary, with an emphasis on open spaces and natural light.
description: A modern, two-story house with large windows, a flat roof, landscaped front and back yards, and a swimming pool. The design is minimalist and geometric, emphasizing open spaces and natural light.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows, a gated entry, a blossoming tree, and a red landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Side view with a solid wall, rooftop terrace, and green spaces visible at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a spacious backyard, swimming pool, lounge chairs, and large windows.
description_view_3: Side/rear angle showing the backyard, pool, green areas, and the red landscaped front yard.
attribute_entryway_design: Gated entry with a modern door, no porch, minimal steps, and a landscaped front yard with a decorative tree.
